user.title: Add a Lithe Audio speaker
user.description: Scan the network for speakers automatically, or enter a speaker's IP address manually.

scan.title: Pick a speaker
scan.description: Found {count} speaker(s). Select one to add.

manual.title: Enter speaker details
manual.description: If you know the speaker's IP address, enter it below. Pick the matching model — TLS is enabled automatically for LS10 speakers (PRO 2, V3, iO1) using a built-in certificate.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Lithe Audio speaker found
zeroconf_confirm.description: A Lithe Audio speaker was found at {host} ({name}). Select the speaker model.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the speaker. Check the IP address and that the speaker is online.

abort.no_devices_found: No Lithe Audio speakers were found on the network.

play_url.name: Play URL
play_url.description: Push a direct audio URL to the speaker.

play_favourite.name: Play Favourite
play_favourite.description: Play a saved favourite by slot.

play_group.name: Play to Cast Group
play_group.description: Play a URL to a Cast group with synchronised LUCI volume.
